creator: t@2uo.de
text:
The package src.txz was incorrectly downloaded.

How-To-Repeat: I downloaded the fifth release candidate for FreeBSD 10.0 and tried to install it in a Virtualbox VM.

In the installer I chose "root on ZFS (experimental)", selected the disk, then I checked all options (games, src, etc).

After that almost all of those txz packages were downloaded and passed the check, but src.txz seems to be corrupt.

The error message is "the checksum for src.txz does not match. It may have become corrupted, and should be redownloaded."

I have no idea which mirror has been used by the installer.
